prompts.prompt:
Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography (Cormorant Garamond style), warm and editorial. Photography style: golden-hour natural light, earthy ceramic bowls, marble countertops, wooden accents. Emotionally warm, empathy-first, village-like nurturing energy.

Emotional empathy-hook static ad that stops every new mother scrolling at 2 AM. Background: soft, dimly lit scene of a tired new mother sitting alone in a kitchen at night, baby sleeping on her shoulder, an empty plate and cold leftovers on the counter, warm but melancholy golden light from a single lamp. Soft cream linen (#F9F7F2) text overlay at top in elegant serif: "You're nourishing everyone except yourself.". Below in warm rust (#B36A5E): "You deserve meals that heal, not just fill.". Bottom strip in sage green (#82937E): Mothers Chef logo + "Postpartum Healing Meals · Delivered Every Sunday" + motherschefsd.com. Deep emotional resonance. Not guilt — empathy. Aspect ratio 4:5.

copy.headline: You're nourishing everyone except yourself.
copy.subhead: You deserve meals that heal, not just fill.

prompts.notes: N01 — Pain-point empathy hook. The #1 performing ad pattern in postpartum/new-mom niche. Targets the exhausted mother scrolling at 2AM.

prompts.prompt:
Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography (Cormorant Garamond style), warm and editorial. Photography style: golden-hour natural light.

Founder trust-building static ad. Background: warm, naturally-lit kitchen scene with Brittany (Doula B) — a warm, confident Black woman in a clean apron and natural hair, holding a beautifully plated healing meal, smiling warmly at the camera. Bright California kitchen, fresh herbs and ceramic bowls on the counter behind her. Soft sage green (#82937E) overlay bar at top: "Designed by a Doula. Cooked by a Chef." in cream serif text. Below the photo: cream linen (#F9F7F2) section with elegant serif quote: "I started Mother's Chef because every mother deserves a village." — Brittany Griffin, Postpartum Doula & Founder. Bottom strip in warm rust (#B36A5E): Mothers Chef logo + motherschefsd.com. Warm, trustworthy, personal. Aspect ratio 4:5.

copy.headline: Designed by a Doula. Cooked by a Chef.
copy.subhead: I started Mother's Chef because every mother deserves a village.

prompts.notes: N02 — Founder trust story. Brittany's doula background is the ultimate trust differentiator.

prompts.prompt:
Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography (Cormorant Garamond style), warm and editorial.

Appetite-triggering healing food hero ad. Full-frame close-up of a steaming golden turmeric bone broth soup in a handmade sage-green ceramic bowl, swirled with coconut cream, topped with fresh herbs and a sprinkle of black sesame seeds. Steam rising in golden backlight. Beside it: a slice of warm seeded sourdough on a wooden board, a small bowl of sea salt, fresh ginger root, and a linen napkin. Warm marble countertop, soft natural light from a nearby window, lavender sprig at edge of frame. Minimal text — small elegant serif text at bottom on cream strip: "Mineral-Dense · Hormone-Balancing · Made for Healing" + Mothers Chef logo + motherschefsd.com. Let the food speak. Aspect ratio 1:1.
prompts.notes: N03 — Hero food shot. Turmeric soup is her hero product. Visual appetite appeal.

prompts.prompt:
Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography (Cormorant Garamond style), warm and editorial.

Bold guarantee-first static ad. Background: warm cream linen (#F9F7F2) with subtle watercolor sage green wash. Center: elegant circular badge/seal in sage green (#82937E) with cream text: "7-DAY ENERGY GUARANTEE" surrounded by a delicate laurel wreath. Below the seal in dark plum (#4A2E32) elegant serif: "Feel a noticeable difference in your energy and calm within 7 days — or your next week is on us.". Trust signals below in warm rust (#B36A5E): "✓ Gluten-Free & Dairy-Free · ✓ Organic & Grass-Fed · ✓ Top 8 Allergen Friendly · ✓ Doula-Designed". Bottom: Mothers Chef logo + "The Village Starts Here" + motherschefsd.com. Risk-reversal, trust-building. Aspect ratio 4:5.

copy.headline: 7-Day Energy Guarantee
copy.subhead: Feel a noticeable difference in your energy and calm within 7 days — or your next week is on us.

prompts.notes: N04 — Guarantee-first ad. Risk reversal is massive for premium-priced postpartum services.

prompts.prompt:
Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography, warm and editorial.

Emotional doorstep delivery moment ad. Background: warm, sun-dappled front porch scene. A smiling new mother in soft loungewear holding her baby, opening the front door to find a premium sage-green branded thermal delivery bag with the Mothers Chef logo, eco-friendly glass meal containers visible inside with handwritten label tags. Warm golden California morning light, potted plants, a welcoming home entrance. Genuine joy and relief on the mother's face. Top overlay text in cream serif on soft sage overlay: "Your village just arrived.". Bottom strip in warm rust (#B36A5E): "Free Sunday Delivery · San Diego County" + Mothers Chef logo + motherschefsd.com. Warm, aspirational, emotionally resonant. Aspect ratio 4:5.

copy.headline: Your village just arrived.
copy.subhead: Free Sunday Delivery · San Diego County

prompts.notes: N05 — Doorstep delivery moment. The branded bag is a key visual asset.

prompts.prompt:
Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography, warm and editorial.

Powerful testimonial static ad. Background: softly blurred warm domestic scene — a peaceful mother and baby on a couch, golden light. Cream linen (#F9F7F2) card overlay with subtle drop shadow, centered. Large gold five-star rating (★★★★★) at top in warm rust (#B36A5E). Bold elegant serif headline: "With my second baby I chose to prioritize myself, my nutrition and my healing for my postpartum.". Attribution: "— Melinda O. · San Diego Mom · 4th Trimester Program". Below: "Every meal she prepared was made with clean organic, grass fed meats and so much intention." — Elizabeth W. Bottom: Mothers Chef logo + "1000% would recommend" in warm rust + motherschefsd.com. Trust-building, social proof. Aspect ratio 4:5.

copy.headline: With my second baby I chose to prioritize myself, my nutrition and my healing.

prompts.notes: N06 — Testimonial card with real customer quotes. Verbatim from Google reviews.

prompts.prompt:
Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography, warm and editorial.

Premium package showcase ad. Background: warm cream linen (#F9F7F2) with elegant layout. Top: sage green (#82937E) header bar with cream text: "The Fourth Trimester Recovery Experience". Below: beautiful flat-lay photo showing the complete package — a row of glass meal containers with colorful healing meals, a small jar of herbal tea blend, a handwritten welcome card, all arranged on a marble surface with lavender sprigs and linen. Price in large warm rust (#B36A5E) serif: "$897 · 4 Weekly Deliveries · 40 Servings". Payment plan callout: "Or 4 payments of $250". Bullet points in deep plum (#4A2E32): "✓ 4 soups/stews + 2 organic meals + 2 snacks per week · ✓ Custom herbal tea blend · ✓ Direct access to Doula B · ✓ 7-Day Energy Guarantee". Bottom: "Limited to 15 mothers per week" in warm rust + Mothers Chef logo + motherschefsd.com. Premium, organized, compelling. Aspect ratio 4:5.
prompts.notes: N07 — Premium package showcase. The $897 package is the highest AOV product.

prompts.prompt:
Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography, warm and editorial.

Clean ingredients comparison ad. Exact vertical 50/50 split on cream background. LEFT SIDE: heading "Typical Meal Delivery" in muted gray. Faded image of generic plastic takeout containers with standard meal prep food. Ingredient callouts in red/gray: "✗ Seed Oils · ✗ Gluten · ✗ Dairy · ✗ Processed · ✗ Reheated Frozen". RIGHT SIDE: heading "Mothers Chef" in sage green (#82937E). Vibrant image of beautiful glass containers with healing soups and organic meals, warm golden light. Ingredient callouts in warm rust (#B36A5E): "✓ 100% Organic · ✓ Grass-Fed Meats · ✓ Gluten-Free & Dairy-Free · ✓ Top 8 Allergen Friendly · ✓ Fresh, Never Frozen". Center divider with small Mothers Chef logo badge. Bottom: "Not a meal service. A recovery protocol." + motherschefsd.com. Aspect ratio 1:1.

copy.headline: Not a meal service. A recovery protocol.
copy.subhead: 100% Organic · Gluten-Free · Dairy-Free · Top 8 Allergen Friendly

prompts.notes: N08 — Us vs them clean ingredient comparison. Differentiates from generic meal prep.

prompts.prompt:
Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography, warm and editorial.

Healing timeline infographic ad. Background: clean cream linen (#F9F7F2). Top: elegant serif header "Your Healing Journey" in deep plum (#4A2E32) with sage green accent line. Four connected milestone cards flowing vertically with a thin sage green timeline line:
Week 1: "Energy Returns" — icon of sunrise, warm rust text: "Mineral-dense broths begin replenishing what birth depleted"
Week 2: "Fog Lifts" — icon of clarity/lightbulb, warm rust text: "Omega-3s and iron-rich meals support brain recovery"
Week 3: "Strength Builds" — icon of growing plant, warm rust text: "Protein and nutrient-dense meals fuel physical healing"
Week 4: "You Feel Like You Again" — icon of heart/mother, warm rust text: "Your body is nourished, your energy is sustained"
Bottom: Mothers Chef logo + "Start Your Healing" + motherschefsd.com. Educational, trust-building. Aspect ratio 4:5.
prompts.notes: N09 — Healing journey timeline. Educates while selling the 4-week program.

prompts.prompt:
Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography, warm and editorial.

Baby shower gifting ad. Background: soft, celebratory baby shower scene — pastel balloons, eucalyptus garlands, white linens, warm natural light. Center: elegant card/gift certificate mockup with sage green (#82937E) border and cream background, reading "The Gift of Healing" in elegant serif. Inside the card: "Give a new mother the gift she actually needs — 4 weeks of chef-crafted postpartum meals, delivered to her door." Price: "Starting at $169/week or the full Fourth Trimester Experience for $897". Small icons: meal containers, herbal tea, heart. Bottom: warm rust (#B36A5E) strip: "The gift every new mom wishes she had." + Mothers Chef logo + motherschefsd.com. Gifting angle, aspirational. Aspect ratio 1:1.

copy.headline: The Gift of Healing

prompts.notes: N10 — Baby shower gift angle. Targets friends/family of expecting mothers — different buyer persona.

Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography, warm and editorial.

Community social proof ad. Background: cream linen (#F9F7F2) with soft sage green watercolor border. Top: "Join the Village" in elegant deep plum (#4A2E32) serif. Below: 3 stacked review excerpts in warm editorial card format, each with ★★★★★ stars in warm rust (#B36A5E):
"1000% would recommend — Brittany supported me with delicious healthy meals for 5 weeks" — Hayley B.
"Every meal was made with clean organic, grass fed meats and so much intention around postpartum" — Elizabeth W.

prompts.prompt:
Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography, warm and editorial.

Premium lifestyle product spread ad. Beautiful overhead flat-lay on warm marble countertop: four eco-friendly glass jars with bamboo lids containing colorful healing meals — golden turmeric soup, vibrant green mineral broth, a nourishing grain bowl with roasted vegetables, and overnight oats with berries and seeds. Each jar has a handwritten-style label (Soup, Lunch, Snack, Breakfast). Scattered around: fresh herbs, a linen napkin, lavender sprigs, a wooden spoon, and a small ceramic cup of herbal tea. Soft golden-hour light from window. A mother's hand gently reaching for one jar, baby blanket visible at edge of frame. Minimal text — small sage green (#82937E) banner at bottom: "Mothers Chef · Postpartum Healing Meals · motherschefsd.com". Let the beautiful packaging and food sell itself. Aspect ratio 1:1.

copy.headline: Postpartum Healing Meals
copy.subhead: Glass jars. Clean ingredients. Delivered with love.

prompts.notes: N12 — Glass jar lifestyle spread. The eco-friendly packaging is a visual differentiator.
